name: Amazon Echo Dot (5th Gen) Smart Speaker with Alexa
description: The redesigned Echo Dot delivers improved audio with clearer vocals and deeper bass. With Alexa, you can play music, control smart home devices, make calls, and get information hands-free. Features a built-in temperature sensor and eero mesh Wi-Fi extender capability.
features: Improved audio with clearer vocals and deeper bass compared to prior generation
Built-in Alexa voice assistant for hands-free control
Built-in temperature sensor for smart home automations
Acts as an eero mesh Wi-Fi extender
Tap the top to snooze alarms or pause music

name: Google Nest Mini (2nd Gen) Smart Speaker
description: Google Nest Mini is a smart speaker powered by Google Assistant. It delivers rich, clear sound with 40mm driver and is made from recycled materials. Wall-mountable design fits anywhere in your home.
features: Google Assistant built-in for voice control and queries
40mm driver delivers rich, clear sound with strong bass
Made from 35% post-consumer recycled plastic
Wall-mountable with built-in screw slot
Ultrasound sensing detects when your hand is near to show volume controls

name: Amazon Echo (4th Gen) Premium Sound Smart Speaker with Alexa
description: The Amazon Echo (4th Gen) delivers premium Dolby Audio with a 3-inch woofer and dual 0.8-inch tweeters for rich, detailed sound. It doubles as a Zigbee smart home hub and includes a built-in temperature sensor for automations.
features: Dolby Audio with 3" woofer and dual 0.8" tweeters for room-filling sound
Built-in Zigbee smart home hub connects compatible devices directly
Built-in temperature sensor for smart routines
Privacy controls with mic off button and streaming indicator
Multi-room music support with other Echo devices

name: Google Nest Audio Smart Speaker
description: Google Nest Audio fills your room with rich, clear, natural sound thanks to a 75mm woofer and 19mm tweeter. It adapts to your environment using Media EQ and Ambient IQ. Pair two for stereo sound throughout your home.
features: 75mm woofer and 19mm tweeter for rich, full-range audio
Media EQ automatically tunes audio to what you're listening to
Ambient IQ adjusts volume based on background noise in your room
Pair two Nest Audio speakers for stereo sound
Stream music from Spotify, YouTube Music, Apple Music and more

name: Amazon Echo Show 10 (3rd Gen) HD Smart Display with Alexa
description: The Echo Show 10 features a 10.1-inch HD screen that automatically rotates to face you during video calls or while following recipes. With a 13MP camera and directional sound, it delivers an immersive experience for entertainment and communication.
features: 10.1-inch HD display that intelligently rotates to follow you
13MP camera with auto-framing for video calls
Dual front-firing tweeters and powerful woofer for premium sound
Built-in Zigbee smart home hub for direct device pairing
Netflix, Prime Video, and Hulu streaming support

name: Google Nest Hub (2nd Gen) 7" Smart Display
description: The Google Nest Hub (2nd Gen) features a 7-inch touchscreen, sleep tracking with Soli radar, and a 1.7-inch full-range speaker. Control your smart home, stream content, and get personalized help with Google Assistant, all without a camera for bedroom privacy.
features: 7-inch touchscreen for visual smart home controls and media
Sleep Sensing uses Soli radar to track sleep without a camera
1.7-inch full-range speaker with 50% more bass than 1st gen
Photo frame mode with Google Photos integration
Quick Gestures let you pause media with a hand wave

name: Amazon Echo Show 15 15.6" Full HD Smart Display
description: The Echo Show 15 features a 15.6-inch Full HD display designed to be wall-mounted or placed on a stand. Use it as a family hub with shared calendars, sticky notes, and personalized widgets. Visual ID recognizes family members to show personalized content.
features: 15.6-inch Full HD (1080p) display for wall or countertop mounting
Visual ID and Voice ID recognize family members for personalized content
Customizable home screen with widgets, calendars, and sticky notes
5MP camera with built-in shutter for video calls
Fire TV built-in for streaming Netflix, Prime Video, Hulu and more

name: Ring Indoor Cam (2nd Gen) 1080p HD Security Camera
description: The Ring Indoor Cam (2nd Gen) provides 1080p HD video with color night vision and two-way talk. Its compact design fits on any flat surface and features a manual privacy cover for added peace of mind. Works with Alexa for hands-free monitoring.
features: 1080p HD video with enhanced color night vision
Manual privacy cover physically blocks the camera and microphone
Two-way talk with noise cancellation to hear and speak clearly
Real-time motion alerts sent directly to your phone
Easy plug-in setup with no tools or wiring required

name: Ring Stick Up Cam Battery (3rd Gen) Indoor/Outdoor Camera
description: The Ring Stick Up Cam Battery is a versatile security camera that works indoors or outdoors. Powered by a rechargeable battery, it provides 1080p HD video, two-way talk, and customizable motion zones. Weather-resistant for year-round outdoor use.
features: 1080p HD video with infrared night vision
Versatile indoor/outdoor design with weather resistance (IPX5)
Quick-release rechargeable battery for wire-free installation
Customizable motion detection zones to reduce false alerts
Works with Alexa to view live feeds on Echo Show devices

name: Wyze Cam v3 Pro Indoor/Outdoor Security Camera
description: The Wyze Cam v3 Pro delivers 2K QHD resolution with enhanced color night vision and an ultra-wide 160-degree field of view. With AI-powered person, pet, and vehicle detection, it provides smart alerts that matter. Free cloud storage for 12-second clips included.
features: 2K QHD resolution for crystal-clear detail
Enhanced Starlight color night vision sensor
160-degree ultra-wide field of view
AI-powered smart detection for people, pets, packages, and vehicles
IP65 weather resistance for indoor or outdoor use

name: TP-Link Tapo C200 Pan/Tilt 1080p Home Security Camera
description: The TP-Link Tapo C200 provides 360-degree pan and tilt coverage with 1080p Full HD video. It features advanced night vision up to 30 feet, motion detection with push notifications, and two-way audio. Control it easily through the Tapo app.
features: 360-degree horizontal and 114-degree vertical pan/tilt coverage
1080p Full HD with advanced night vision up to 30 feet
Motion detection and tracking with instant push notifications
Two-way audio for real-time communication
Local storage via microSD card (up to 512GB) for privacy

name: ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium with Siri and Alexa Built-In
description: The ecobee Smart Thermostat Premium features a zinc alloy faceplate, built-in Siri and Alexa, and an air quality monitor. Its SmartSensor technology optimizes comfort room by room and can save up to 26% annually on heating and cooling costs.
features: Built-in Siri and Alexa for hands-free voice control
Air quality monitor tracks indoor VOCs and CO2 levels
Includes SmartSensor for room-by-room temperature balancing
Saves up to 26% annually on heating and cooling costs
Premium zinc alloy design with vibrant glass touchscreen display

name: Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th Gen)
description: The redesigned Google Nest Learning Thermostat (4th Gen) features a sleek borderless dome display with a customizable faceplate. It learns your schedule and preferences, automatically creating an energy-efficient routine. Includes a Nest Temperature Sensor for room-level comfort control.
features: Learns your schedule and preferred temperatures within a week
Borderless LCD dome display with customizable faceplates
Includes Nest Temperature Sensor for multi-room comfort
Matter and Thread support for broad smart home compatibility
Energy dashboard shows daily and monthly HVAC usage insights

specs.Connectivity: Wi-Fi 802.11ac, Bluetooth Low Energy, Thread, Matter
specs.Compatibility: Google Home, Amazon Alexa, Apple HomeKit, SmartThings
specs.Included: Nest Temperature Sensor, trim plate, screws

name: Amazon Smart Thermostat with Alexa
description: The Amazon Smart Thermostat is an affordable smart thermostat built with Honeywell Home technology. It learns your routines with Alexa Hunches to automatically adjust temperatures for comfort and savings. ENERGY STAR certified to help reduce energy costs.
features: Built with Honeywell Home thermostat technology
Alexa Hunches learns your habits and adjusts temperature automatically
ENERGY STAR certified for proven energy savings
Simple C-wire or adapter installation in about 15 minutes
Control from anywhere with the Alexa app

specs.Voice Assistant: Alexa (via Echo device or Alexa app)

name: Philips Hue White and Color Ambiance A19 Starter Kit (4-Pack)
description: The Philips Hue White and Color Ambiance Starter Kit includes four A19 smart bulbs and the Hue Bridge for complete smart lighting control. Choose from 16 million colors and warm-to-cool white shades. Set scenes, create automations, and sync lights with music or movies.
features: 16 million colors and warm-to-cool white light (2000K-6500K)
Includes Hue Bridge for reliable Zigbee connectivity up to 50 bulbs
Voice control with Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple HomeKit/Siri
Schedule lights to turn on/off automatically or mimic presence when away
Sync lights with music, movies, and games using Hue Sync

specs.Included: 4 color bulbs, 1 Hue Bridge, 1 Ethernet cable, 1 power adapter

name: Philips Hue Lightstrip Plus V4 Base Kit (6.6 ft)
description: The Philips Hue Lightstrip Plus V4 adds flexible accent lighting under cabinets, along shelves, or behind your TV. With 16 million colors and tunable white light, it creates the perfect ambiance for any occasion. Easily cut to size or extend up to 33 feet.
features: Flexible 6.6ft lightstrip with adhesive backing for easy mounting
16 million colors plus tunable white (2000K-6500K)
Cuttable and extendable up to 33 feet with extensions
1600 lumens of bright, even light output
Requires Philips Hue Bridge (sold separately) for full functionality

name: TP-Link Kasa Smart Light Bulb KL135 Multicolor (2-Pack)
description: The TP-Link Kasa KL135 smart bulbs offer millions of colors and tunable white light without requiring a hub. Connect directly to your Wi-Fi and control via the Kasa app, Alexa, or Google Assistant. Set schedules, create scenes, and adjust brightness from anywhere.
features: No hub required - connects directly to your Wi-Fi network
16 million colors plus tunable white light (2500K-6500K)
Voice control with Alexa and Google Assistant
Schedule and timer features through the Kasa app
Group control to manage multiple bulbs together

name: Philips Hue White Ambiance BR30 LED Smart Bulb (2-Pack)
description: The Philips Hue White Ambiance BR30 recessed bulbs deliver tunable white light from warm candlelight to bright daylight. Perfect for recessed cans and track lighting, they support dimming, schedules, and natural wake-up routines. Requires Hue Bridge for full smart features.
features: Tunable white light from warm 2200K to cool daylight 6500K
BR30 form factor ideal for recessed ceiling fixtures
Natural wake-up and go-to-sleep light routines
Dim without a dimmer switch using the Hue app
Compatible with Alexa, Google Assistant, and Apple HomeKit

specs.Connectivity: Zigbee via Hue Bridge or Bluetooth

name: Wyze Bulb Color Smart Bulb (4-Pack)
description: The Wyze Bulb Color 4-pack offers 16 million colors and tunable white light at an unbeatable price. No hub needed - connect directly via Wi-Fi. Each bulb produces 1100 lumens of bright, vivid color and supports voice control with Alexa and Google Assistant.
features: 16 million colors plus tunable white (1800K-6500K)
No hub required - connects directly via 2.4GHz Wi-Fi
1100 lumens brightness with 75W equivalent output
Voice control with Alexa and Google Assistant
Vacation mode simulates occupancy with random on/off patterns

name: TP-Link Kasa Smart Wi-Fi Light Switch HS200
description: The TP-Link Kasa HS200 smart light switch replaces your standard wall switch to make any light smart. No hub required - it connects directly to Wi-Fi for control from anywhere via the Kasa app. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant for convenient voice control.
features: Replaces standard single-pole light switch for whole-room smart control
No hub required - connects directly to your Wi-Fi network
Control lights remotely from anywhere using the Kasa app
Set schedules, timers, and away mode to automate lighting
Voice control with Alexa and Google Assistant
